concepts_used.title: 蒙特卡洛模拟
concepts_used.how_used: 使用Java编写蒙特卡洛模拟程序，循环模拟一天150名顾客到达和服务过程，记录等待时间和队列长度。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: We decided to model this problem using a computer program written in Java that would simulate, using a loop, an actual bank day in which 150 customers entered the bank and were processed.

concepts_used.title: 模型假设的写法
concepts_used.how_used: 列出了6条模型假设，包括银行周日关闭、仅有一个队列和一个出纳员、无中断事件等，并给出每条假设的合理性说明。
concepts_used.source_excerpt:
Assumptions and Justifications
1. Banks are closed on Sundays.
...
6. There are only 150 customers who enter the bank per day.

concepts_used.title: 灵敏度分析
concepts_used.how_used: 通过多次运行模拟（10次）验证结果的一致性，确认模型的稳定性。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: After ten runs, results were consistent with our original model. Therefore, confident of the legitimacy of our results, we began to brainstorm ways to improve service.

concepts_used.title: 如何从数据中提取结论
concepts_used.how_used: 从模拟数据中提取结论：平均等待时间约7分钟，平均队列长度约3人，并据此判断当前服务不达标。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: The modeled average wait time for any given customer is about 7 minutes. ... The modeled average line length at any given minute of the day is about 3 persons.

concepts_used.title: 模型改进与推广部分
concepts_used.how_used: 提出了两种优化方案：一是通过员工培训将服务时间分布调整为65%一分钟和35%两分钟；二是通过任务并行化或增加员工来改善服务。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: Therefore, we recommend achieving a final 65%/35% split between one minute and two minute service times. ... it might consider hiring one more teller to process quick requests and one more banker to service accounts.

concepts_used.title: 流程图绘制规范
concepts_used.how_used: 在附录中包含了程序流程图，用于说明模拟程序的逻辑流程。
